query:
SELECT 
  c.name as customerName,
  s.externalId as serviceId,
  s.planName,
  s.monthlyCost as supplierCost,
  sba.billingItemExternalId as matchedBiId,
  bi_matched.description as matchedBiDesc,
  bi_matched.lineAmount as matchedRevenue,
  bi_best.externalId as bestBiId,
  bi_best.description as bestBiDesc,
  bi_best.lineAmount as bestRevenue
FROM services s
JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = s.customerExternalId
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
LEFT JOIN billing_items bi_matched ON bi_matched.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
LEFT JOIN billing_items bi_best ON bi_best.customerExternalId = s.customerExternalId 
  AND bi_best.lineAmount = (
    SELECT MAX(bi2.lineAmount) FROM billing_items bi2 
    WHERE bi2.customerExternalId = s.customerExternalId
  )
WHERE s.externalId IN ('S8JR3KM','SHB64AC','S72C54J','SHU42OX','SGVQT30','S1UMC04','SEEV150','SKY3MLC','SSE3JV7','SZR96SE','SGBHVJV','S66U54A')
ORDER BY CAST(s.monthlyCost AS DECIMAL) DESC;

LEFT JOIN billing_items bi_matched ON bi_matched.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
LEFT JOIN billing_items bi_best ON bi_best.customerExternalId = s.customerExternalId 
  AND bi_best.lineAmount = (
    SELECT MAX(bi2.lineAmount) FROM billing_items bi2
